headline: Senior ML Engineer | Building Production AI Systems at Scale
summary: 8+ years building end-to-end machine learning pipelines, from research prototyping to production deployment. Deep expertise in transformer architectures, distributed training, and MLOps. Led a team of 5 ML engineers at a Series C startup, shipping recommendation and NLP systems serving 10M+ users. Strong background in Python, PyTorch, and cloud-native ML infrastructure on AWS/GCP.

career_history.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
career_history.description: Led design and deployment of transformer-based NLP pipelines for document understanding. Built real-time inference services handling 50K req/s. Mentored 3 junior engineers and drove adoption of MLflow for experiment tracking.

headline: AI Research Engineer — NLP, Generative AI & Retrieval-Augmented Generation

Currently building production RAG systems for enterprise search. Proficient in PyTorch, Hugging Face, and vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate). Passionate about bridging research and production.
